channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Members of legacy political families seek midterm election success
item.description: From Jack Schlossberg in New York to Jonathan Bush in Maine, voters in 2026 will see many candidates from longstanding political families.

item.title: Trump is not on the Georgia ballot, but he could influence Tuesday's races
item.description: The president's electoral influence will be tested again.

item.title: What to watch in Tuesday's primaries as Trump's endorsement is tested
Nashville to host Super Bowl LXIV in 2030
item.description: Nashville will host the Super Bowl in 2030 at the new Nissan Stadium, marking the first time the city has held the event.
